plugin.framework-ens.framework.name: Esquema Nacional de Seguridad
plugin.framework-ens.framework.descripti: Starter ENS pack with baseline categories and measures for governance, access control, monitoring, backup, and recovery.
plugin.framework-ens.elements.ens-domain: Governance, policy ownership, and accountability measures.
Preventive safeguards for access, backup, and system protection.
Continuity and recovery capabilities after incidents or outages.
plugin.framework-ens.elements.ens-org-go: Define accountable owners, policy structure, and governance checkpoints for the security model.
plugin.framework-ens.elements.ens-protec: Control access rights, privileged access, and periodic recertification of permissions.
Protect backup copies, validate integrity, and ensure restore readiness.
plugin.framework-ens.elements.ens-detect: Monitor relevant systems and record evidence of anomalous activity and response.
plugin.framework-ens.elements.ens-recove: Maintain recovery plans, continuity exercises, and restoration evidence for critical services.
